  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete an organization onboarding portal link"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/projects/{project_id}/organizations/{organization_id}/onboarding-portal-links/{onboarding_portal_link_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes a onboarding portal link for an organization.
